claimBoundary: Agreement with PostgreSQL/PostGIS ST_Within, ST_CoveredBy, ST_Disjoint, and ST_Touches on the exact 7,396 CRS84 Point/Polygon pairs used by the Apache Jena baseline. This is a shared semantic workload, not an OGC conformance certificate, geodesic test, or performance contest.
